title: Zeng Shengwen, Chairman of Tianhui Group, was invited to visit Donghua Energy Co., Ltd.
contentHtml: On May 25, Zeng Shengwen, chairman of Tianhui Group, was invited to visit Donghua Energy Co., Ltd., and Mr. Yi of Donghua Energy warmly received him. During the period, we communicated and exchanged ideas with Mr. Yi’s team on the progress of the next step of cooperation, and both parties expressed their strong willingness to cooperate.
titleZh: 天晖集团董事长曾胜文受邀到访东华能源股份有限公司
contentHtmlZh: 5月25号，天晖集团董事长曾胜文受邀到访东华能源股份有限公司，东华能源易总热情接待。期间与易总团队就下一步合作进展情况进行了沟通和交流，双方均表达了强烈合作的意愿。
